transcription: rimwe na rimwe kandi nkagira kutihanganira urumuri/urusaku. byabaye gake cyane guturuka mu ibyiruka ryanjye-ubu mfite imyaka 41, igihe biheruka kuba nararutse,ndakonja ndanatitira
translation: Sometimes also light / noise sensitive.  Has been a rare but ongoing occurrence since teenage years - now 41 yrs.  Last time it happened also vomited, and cold, shaking.
reference: Sometimes also light / noise sensitive.  Has been a rare but ongoing occurrence since teenage years - now 41 yrs.  Last time it happened also vomited, and cold, shaking.
hypothesis: Rimwe na rimwe kandi angira kutihanganira rumuri cyangwa serusa cyane cyane gutoza mu ntebyiruka ryanjye. Ngumfitiye nyakamwe ugene no n'igihe biruka kwa narurutse dakonje danatitira.

transcription: Namaze kubona ko iyo mbyutse kare cyane maze nkasubira kuryama nk'igice cy'isaha mbyuka meze gutya. Nanone kandi nariye isukari nyinshi cyane mugihe cy'ikiruhuko.
translation: I notice that when I wake up too early and go back to sleep for around a half hour I wake up like this.  I also ate lots of sugar during holidays.
reference: I notice that when I wake up too early and go back to sleep for around a half hour I wake up like this.  I also ate lots of sugar during holidays.
hypothesis: Namaze kuwanako y'umujyu ts'akaricyane n'umisibirakuryama ingice cy'isa. N'yokameze guti, na none kandi nari isukari n'ingi cyane ugiye kikirubu.

transcription: Mukwa 2 kuyu mwaka nazanye ikibyimba mwibere ryanjye  basanga atari kanseri Gusa muganga yambwiye ko biterwa numusemburo witwa aldactone
translation: In Feb this year I found a breast lump which was diagnosed as fibro adenoma .  The doc said the lump may be because of aldactone.
reference: In Feb this year I found a breast lump which was diagnosed as fibro adenoma .  The doc said the lump may be because of aldactone.
hypothesis: Mukwaka biri ko umwaka nazanye icyimba mwibere ryange basanga atari kanseri gusa muganga yamvye ko biterwa n'umusembu witwa Radactone
